title: The Raid on Onigashima Begins
description: On pages 13–15, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Unknown person #14, Kid, Unknown person #15, Luffy, Yamato as The alliance launches the Onigashima raid, exposes betrayal, and collides with Kaido’s forces as the final battle setup begins.
scene: The alliance launches the Onigashima raid, exposes betrayal, and collides with Kaido’s forces as the final battle setup begins.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Hm, that's quite a difficult task.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I imagined his important announcement is related to the young master Yamato?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: So what? That's your family issue

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And if we bring him safe and sound?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: I will give you all right

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: That shouldn't be a problem right?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He keeps messing about... He doesn't even know anything about Oden!!!

dialogue.speaker: Kid
dialogue.text: Hey! Have you not seen a jaggy?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Think I've seen you some where.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: We drink sake here. Go away.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: idiot! It would go well with sake!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Throw it away! The soup is excessively sweet!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Go give it to the people of Okobore Town! GAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHA

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: True! They would lick it off the floor and say thank you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Is it your first time eating this?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: beggars should be grateful to be alive!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Raid on Onigashima Begins storyline with 38 dialogue beats. The alliance launches the Onigashima raid, exposes betrayal, and collides with Kaido’s forces as the final battle setup begins.
